final:
module multiplier_64x64 (
    input [63:0] a,
    input [63:0] b,
    output reg [127:0] product
);
    
    always @(*) begin
        product = a * b; // Perform unsigned multiplication
    end

  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
      product[127:64] <= ~a[63];
      product[63:0] <= ~b[63];
    end
  end

endmodule
